headline: Professor Wobble McTheory Proves That Lost Remote Is Always In The Last Place You Look
summary: 'Because you stop looking after you find it,' McTheory explained. 'That's the secret.'
fullBody: Professor Wobble McTheory has published a study confirming that the lost remote control is always in the last place you look. 'It's not magic,' McTheory explained. 'You stop searching once you find it.' The study cost $2 million to confirm something everyone already knew. McTheory is now researching whether 'it's always in the last place you look' applies to car keys, wallets, and your will to live.
